steps.title: Compare the two tones
steps.content: Text 1 calls rewilding a clear environmental win, emphasizing benefits for biodiversity and carbon absorption. Text 2 acknowledges those encouraging findings but adds a concern about global food supplies and the need for higher-yield farming.

steps.title: Reject invented differences
steps.content: Choice B says Text 2 disputes the farmland percentage, but it does not. Choice C invents a disagreement about timing. Choice D misstates the focus of each text, since both discuss environmental benefits. The answer is A.
